heading: Ethical, legal, and societal considerations
label: 19118 Ethical, legal, and societal considerations
text: The Director shall engage, as appropriate, experts in the social dimensions of science and technology and set up formal avenues for public input, as appropriate, to ensure that ethical, legal, and societal considerations are taken into account in the priorities and activities of the Directorate, including in the selection of the challenges and key technology focus areas under and the award-making process, and throughout all stages of supported projects.section 19107 of this title
